title: hieracium alatum subsp. benthamianum
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. benthamianum, commonly known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Hieracium alatum subsp. benthamianum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve kidney function, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes due to potential toxicity.
